stemHtml:
A commercial operator is planning to operate a medium range jet transport aeroplane to destination 1, but with destination 2 available as a suitable aerodrome for a fuel stop as per the reduced contingency fuel regulations. There is also a suitable ERA aerodrome available for the flight to destination 2. Given the following information, calculate the minimum take-off fuel required.

Average fuel flow: 3010 kg/hr 
Flight time from departure to decision point: 4 h 29 min 
Flight Time from decision point to destination 1: 1 h 46 min 
Alternate fuel: 1455 kg 
Flight Time from decision point to destination 2: 0 h 46 min 
Alternate fuel: 1906 kg 
Final reserve: 1360 kg
